creator: andrej.zverev@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #6)
Hello Ed,

Huawei no longer sell server platform (now it's xFusion). I don't know if xFusion still contain hisilicon chip or not. I appreciate for your help. 

If you willing to wait few months, i'll get one xFusion server and check patch from Linux. This is all i can do right now.

P.S. I tried to contact with Huawei about FreeBSD (hisilicon VGA) for long time ago, but my issue was on their todo list for years without any movement.
Huawei no longer sell server platform (now it's xFusion). 

Maybe it's better to close this bug if you willing.
